title: Financial Aid Sap Deadlines
content:
Financial Aid - Satisfactory Academic Progress, Deadlines, and Contact
Morgan State University

---

SATISFACTORY ACADEMIC PROGRESS (SAP)

To maintain financial aid eligibility, students must meet SAP requirements:

1. GPA Requirement: Maintain minimum cumulative GPA
   - Undergraduate: 2.0
   - Graduate: 3.0

2. Completion Rate: Complete at least 67% of attempted credit hours

3. Maximum Timeframe: Complete degree within 150% of program length
   - For 120-credit program: Maximum 180 attempted credits

SAP is reviewed at the end of each semester. Students not meeting requirements may:
- Lose financial aid eligibility
- Be placed on Financial Aid Warning or Suspension
- Appeal the decision if extenuating circumstances exist

IMPORTANT DEADLINES

- FAFSA Priority Deadline: March 1 (for best consideration)
- FAFSA Available: October 1 each year
- Verification Documents: Submit within 2 weeks of request

---

DOCUMENT SUBMISSION

All required documents can be:
- Faxed to: (443) 885-8272
- Emailed to: finaid@morgan.edu

IMPORTANT: Include your Student ID on all documents
Please allow 72 business hours for documents to be posted on WEBSIS.
